DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO DEPOSITION QUESTIONS IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE OBJECTIONS TO THE QUESTIONS WERE UNMERITORIOUS AND MADE WITHOUT SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $836.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
